song.title: Shine Thou Upon Us Lord
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Shine Thou upon us, Lord, True Light of men, today, And through the written Word Thy very self display;|| That so from hearts which burn With gazing on Thy face, Thy little ones may learn The wonders of Thy grace.
[V2] 2) Breathe Thou upon us, Lord, Thy Spirit’s living flame, That so with one accord Our lips may tell Thy name;|| Give Thou the hearing ear, Fix Thou the wand’ring thought, That those we teach may hear The great things Thou hast wrought.
[V3] 3) Speak Thou for us, O Lord, In all we say of Thee; According to Thy Word Let all our teaching be;|| That so Thy lambs may know Their own true Shepherd’s voice, Where’er He leads them go, And in His love rejoice.
[V4] 4) Live Thou within us, Lord; Thy mind and will be ours; Be Thou beloved, adored, And served with all our pow’rs;|| That so our lives may teach Thy children what Thou art, And plead, by more than speech, For Thee with every heart.
song.author: John Ellerton
